property.name: Villa Rosa
property.greeting: Welcome to Villa Rosa! We are delighted to have you as our guest.

about.title: The House
about.text: Villa Rosa is a traditional Florentine townhouse dating back to the 19th century. Lovingly restored, it blends original features — terracotta floors, vaulted ceilings — with all modern comforts.

about.title: Your Hosts
about.text: We are Marco and Sofia. We have lived in Florence all our lives and love sharing our city with guests from around the world. Don't hesitate to reach out — we are always happy to give tips!

about.title: The Neighbourhood
about.text: You are staying in the lively Santa Croce district, just steps from the famous basilica. Local cafés, markets and trattorias are all within a short walk.

wifi.notes: The network covers the entire house and garden.

instructions: Find the key box with the code next to the main door
Enter and leave your ID document on the table
Parking is in the rear courtyard

checkout.late_checkout: Contact us to check availability (extra charge may apply)
instructions: Leave the keys on the kitchen table
Take out the rubbish from the bin under the sink
Close all windows and the main front door

map.walking_notes: The historic city centre is a 10-minute walk away.
map.directions_text:
From the train station, take Via Roma towards the cathedral.
After the small square, turn left into Via delle Rose.
The house is the second building on the right, with a blue gate.

directions_photos.caption: The blue gate — entrance on your right
Parking is in the courtyard at the back

restaurants.name: Trattoria da Mario
restaurants.description: Great for lunch. Family atmosphere — book ahead on Fridays.

attractions.name: Uffizi Gallery
attractions.description: One of the most important museums in the world. Book online in advance.
attractions.tip: Arrive right at opening time to avoid the queues.

attractions.name: Piazzale Michelangelo
attractions.description: Breathtaking panoramic view over Florence. Perfect at sunset.
attractions.tip: Bring a bottle of wine and enjoy the sunset.

transport.parking: Free private parking in the courtyard. Access from Via Laterale.
transport.bus: Line 14 stop 200m away (towards the centre every 10 minutes).
transport.taxi: Use the MyTaxi app or call 055 4390.
transport.train: Santa Maria Novella station is 15 minutes on foot or 5 by taxi.
transport.airport: Amerigo Vespucci Airport: 20 min by taxi (approx. €25).

faq.question: Is there air conditioning?
faq.answer: Yes, in every room. The remote control is in the bedside table drawer.

faq.question: Where do I put the rubbish?
faq.answer: Coloured bins on the street: green (glass/cans), yellow (plastic), blue (paper), grey (general waste).

faq.question: Can I check in early?
faq.answer: Message us on WhatsApp — we will do our best to accommodate you.
